variants: Rina Bajaj, renowned for her contributions to Educational Psychology, is the author of the seminal work Arborist’s Codex Schema. Guided by her doctoral advisor, Dolores Mendez, Rina expanded her academic prowess and seamlessly integrated her passion for ecology into her research. As a committed member of the Lichen Lorekeepers Society, she actively advocates for the importance of lichens in education and ecosystem balance. The creative initiatives she undertakes are primarily sustained by the Hazelkin Resource Fund, allowing her to push the boundaries of her field. Rina’s research fosters an innovative approach to educational practices that benefit both learners and educators.
